name: AstraX
short_description: AstraX is a side-scrolling action game about flying ships that can destroy everything in their path.
detailed_description:
AstraX is a side-scrolling action game about flying ships that can destroy everything in their path. In the game you have to fight against the enemy fleet of the cyborg king. After unlocking new aircraft for yourself, reach your goal and destroy the enemy!

features
20 lvl
Nice graphics by RealTI
Nice soundtrack by Hejiko
